REDDWARF-COWED_POWER.title: Despair
REDDWARF-COWED_POWER.description: Damage is increased by percentage equal to [purple]Despair[/purple]. Reduces by 5 when triggered and by 25% at end of turn.
REDDWARF-COWED_POWER.smartDescription: Damage is increased by percentage equal to [purple]Despair[/purple]. Reduces by 5 when triggered and by 25% at end of turn.

REDDWARF-RADIATION_POWER.title: Radiation
REDDWARF-RADIATION_POWER.description: Enemies receive damage equal to their [green]Radiation[/green] exposure at the start of their turn. Radiation halves each turn.

REDDWARF-SCRAP_POWER.description: Can be exchanged via specific cards or powers for bonuses including but not limited to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, [blue]Block[/blue], [gold]Gold[/gold] and attack damage.
